description: Update your style quotient with ease by adding this stylish, red and black bag from lino perros to your accessory collection. Roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth silhouette of this bag blends well with any outfit.Height: 35 cmWidth: 42 cmDepth: 12 cmMade of synthetic leather and a blended fabric for durabilityHas one main roomy, zipped compartment with one inner zipped compartment and an organiser pouch for essentialsOne short broad handle woven through metallic loops and a long, removable and adjustable strap for carrying ease and styleA zipped pocket at the backSmall metallic stud design on the front with two zipped pockets on the sides for styleStitch detailing, branded zips and brand badge appliqué d on the front CareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
